channel.title: Comments on: 2013 Craft Brewers Conference, Ep. 186
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul Leone
item.dc:creator: Paul Leone
item.description: Thanks Scott, I certainly wish we could do more of these!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Scott, I certainly wish we could do more of these!

item.title: By: Scott Coughlin
item.dc:creator: Scott Coughlin
item.description:
Great job you guys. I love your beer reviews but I also enjoy these informative videos. It is nice to see the industry growing.
Bottoms Up
item.content:encoded:
Great job you guys. I love your beer reviews but I also enjoy these informative videos. It is nice to see the industry growing.

Bottoms Up
